description_long: This chair features a round, flat seat supported by four slender, outward-angled legs, giving it a stable yet lightweight appearance. The backrest is composed of a series of curved, tubular elements that rise vertically and arch backward, providing ergonomic support and a visually distinctive profile. The armrests are integrated into the backrest structure, curving gently downward and connecting to the seat for added comfort and style. The entire chair is rendered in a uniform, medium-brown wood texture, suggesting a natural material suitable for both durability and aesthetic appeal. The design is minimalist yet functional, with open spaces between the structural elements that contribute to a modern, airy look. This chair would be well-suited for urban outdoor settings such as parks, cafes, or public plazas.
description: A modern wooden chair with a round seat, curved backrest, and integrated armrests, supported by four angled legs. The design is minimalist and airy, with a medium-brown wood finish.
description_view_0: The chair is seen from a rear angle, highlighting the curved backrest and the connection of the armrests to the seat.
description_view_1: A direct side view shows the profile of the backrest and armrest, as well as the round seat and one of the angled legs.
description_view_2: Another side view from the opposite direction, emphasizing the symmetry of the backrest and the open space beneath the seat.
description_view_3: A rear three-quarter view displays the curvature of the backrest and the arrangement of the legs, with the armrest structure clearly visible.
